net-mgmt/py-pysmi: Update to 1.5.9

Changelog
=========

-    Update to 1.5.9
-    Note: this update drops support for Python 3.8 per upstream


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 14.2R amd64 w/py310 and py311 (default). Unable to test with py39 due to indirect dependency via www/py-requests on devel/py-setuptools-scm (see bug #278299).
